description: Mesh telemetry with high-cardinality labels overwhelms the metrics backend.
body: Failure mode: custom dimensions (request paths, user IDs, unbounded headers) are added to mesh metrics, multiplying time series until the metrics backend is overwhelmed and dashboards slow or drop data. Detection signals: metric series count exploding, the backend rejecting samples or OOMing, and high-cardinality labels on request metrics. Do not add unbounded labels to per-request mesh metrics. Safer fallback: keep mesh metric labels to bounded dimensions (workload, namespace, response code/flag), drop or aggregate high-cardinality labels in the telemetry config, and reduce sampling for traces.
